comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Colombia episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE COLOMBIA COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we'd recommend → https://amzn.to/4dQ1l7o

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN COLOMBIA*
  ◦ Ciudad Perdida treks, Cartagena tours, coffee region day trips → https://shorturl.at/1DOdQ
  ◦ Browse all Colombia experiences → https://shorturl.at/IDhnr

*📖 PLAN YOUR COLOMBIA TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Colombia, latest edition → https://amzn.to/4fLNgKQ
  ◦ Lonely Planet Latin American Spanish Phrasebook → https://amzn.to/4uGZU2s

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO COLOMBIA*
  ◦ Magdalena: River of Dreams by Wade Davis, National Geographic Explorer's masterwork → https://amzn.to/4dALA5t
  ◦ One Hundred Years of Solitude by Gabriel García Márquez, Nobel Prize literature → https://amzn.to/4vfPWVD

*🍲 BRING COLOMBIA HOME*
  ◦ Colombiana cookbook by Mariana Velásquez, the first cookbook dedicated to Colombian food → https://amzn.to/43AtyKI
  ◦ Authentic Wayuu Mochila bag, handwoven by indigenous Wayuu artisans → https://amzn.to/4tW1Bb3

comments.text: The world is beautiful. The only problem is USA.
